Hair Color Portfolio

A visual portfolio for a color and cutting specialist, focused on clarity, style, and credibility.

Problem

Create a clean, image‑first portfolio that highlights transformations and builds trust quickly.

Approach

Prioritized gallery presentation and fast image scanning.

Kept the interface minimal to keep focus on the work.

Optimized layout for phone browsing and quick booking.

Role & Tools

Role: Design, front‑end build

Tools: HTML/CSS, JavaScript
